Rik,a-icir-1 (fir) RI t,1 1.1y1-1 -- 2 of 4 -- [ `17-4 fl 41 1-1,4 :3-711NRIT1 3 (1) (2) (3) 1-cic\cf-Itly4 chic-c114 rclq114S111471-144 ti -II flt1 44 4 W Tf. 3TITqt0 chigrog ( 1 ) (2) (3) Clchlif Tlgrt 7'441 779T 11'1d'* chlcdchIcli 71g-ft cich1c11 I T4Kra C•5 4.'RR 9. 7-0-41-6 f-071 1-1.11c1c4, chIcichldi -Trru 411110,4, ThOt Tqlwrt ftEetrl <rb ch1c11 14. 1-11R gaiwral "Passport Seva Kendra" means a passport application processing centre under the Passport Seva Project; eel; "Passport Seva Project" means the public private partnership model project to accept and process passport applications, issue of passport, maintain data thereto and all other works connected therewith; "Schedule" means the Schedule annexed to these rules; "section" means section of the Act; "Service Provider" means a person or entity which is awarded the contract for implementing a Passport Seva Project. (2) Words and expressions used herein and not defined, but defined in the Act shall have the meaning respectively assigned to them in the Act. Passport Seva Kendras.-(1) The Passport Seva Kendras under the Passport Seva Project shall be set up by the Service Provider with the approval of the Central Government. (2) The Passport Seva Kendra as specified in column (2) of Schedule I shall operate within the jurisdiction of the Passport Office shown against it in column (3) of the said Schedule. Mini-Passport Seva Kendras.-The Mini-Passport Seva Kendra as specified in column (2) of Schedule II shall operate within the jurisdiction of the Passport Office shown against it in column (3) of the said Schedule. SCHEDULE I (g) [ TR. 6/401/01/05/08 ] [See sub-rule(2) of rule 31 4-1IFJP** TiziTT 74f-d4 SI. No. Passport. Seva Kendras Passport Office 3TrET-*-rft MINLSTRY OF EXTERNAL AFFAIRS (1) (2) (3) NOTIFICATION Ahmedabad -1 Ahmedabad New Delhi, the 28th April, 2010 Ahmedabad-2 Ahmedabad G.S.R. 371(E).-In exerciseofthepowers conferred Vadodara (Baroda) Ahmedabad by clause (i) of sub-section (2) of Section 24 of the Rajkot Ahmedabad Passports Act, 1967 (15 of 1967), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules, namely :- Amritsar Bangalore-1 Amritsar Bangalore 1. Short title and commencement.-(1 ) These rules may be called the Passports Application (Facilitation and Processing) Rules, 2010. Bangalore-2 Hubli-Dharwad Bangalore Bangalore (2) They shall come into force on the date of their Mangalore Bangalore publication in the Official Gazette. Bareilly Bareilly 2. Definitions.-(1) In these rules, unless the Bhopal Bhopal context otherwise requires,- Bhubaneswar Bhubaneswar "Act" means the Passports Act, 1967 (15 of 1967); 13.
